vocab.meaning: trải qua một sự thay đổi diện mạo hoàn toàn
vocab.example: Over the past decade, my hometown has undergone a radical transformation from a sleepy village to a bustling urban center.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: I’ve had to adapt to the hustle and bustle of city life ever since they built the new commercial district nearby.

vocab.meaning: quá trình chỉnh trang đô thị (thường đi kèm việc giá cả tăng cao)
vocab.example: The gentrification of the old quarters has brought in boutique cafes but also driven up the cost of living.

vocab.meaning: đô thị toàn bê tông (nghĩa tiêu cực về sự thiếu mảng xanh)
vocab.example: It’s a bit saddening that our green spaces have been replaced by a concrete jungle of high-rise apartments.

vocab.meaning: nảy nở, tăng nhanh chóng về số lượng
vocab.example: Shopping malls and entertainment complexes have proliferated across the area in recent years.

vocab.meaning: sự tăng trưởng chưa từng thấy
vocab.example: The region has witnessed unprecedented growth in terms of infrastructure and foreign investment.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở hạ tầng hiện đại nhất
vocab.example: The government has prioritized the development of state-of-the-art infrastructure, including a new subway system.

vocab.meaning: mất đi vẻ quyến rũ/nét đặc trưng ban đầu
vocab.example: While the modernization is convenient, many locals feel the neighborhood has lost its original charm.

vocab.meaning: một trung tâm thương mại sầm uất
vocab.example: What used to be an abandoned industrial site has been repurposed into a vibrant commercial hub.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị tràn lan
vocab.example: The urban sprawl has reached the outskirts, turning formerly agricultural land into residential suburbs.
